description: Style Note You'll catch every passing eye with this beautiful gold studded necklace and earrings from estelle. The subtle design gives a touch of sophistication while the gold plating provides an exquisite sheen.estelle jewellery is 24 Carat Gold/Silver Plated. The base metal used for Estelle is Pewter.Warranty: 1 yearProduct Details Gold studded chain with pendant and earrings from EstellePendant in the form of five curvilinear studded strokes, earrings with three curvilinear studded strokes, metal fasteningMaterial and Care 24 carat gold platedPewter base metalEarring posts made of hypo-allergic surgical steel to avoid skin allergiesHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSize Length of chain: 41 cm Length of pendant: 3.7 cm Length of earrings: 1.6 cm
